title: PRMP vs Standard Aggregation on RelBench rel-stack (user-engagement, post-votes)
summary: Demo notebook implementing Predictive Residual Message Passing (PRMP) vs standard baselines (Linear Regression, MLP) on RelBench rel-stack FK-link cross-table prediction datasets. Loads 9 FK links with 99 total examples from mini_demo_data.json. Computes 2D diagnostic (cardinality × predictability R²), trains PRMP with zero-init final layer and dual-loss training, performs regime analysis correlating cardinality×predictability with PRMP improvement. Includes visualization with R² comparison bars, improvement chart, and regime scatter plot.
